Seed: seed_003 | Floor: 1/2 | Turn: 0/100
Status: ACTIVE | HP: 20/20

events.message: You lift the Dawn Bell as sunrise paints the stairwell gold. The dungeon exhales; you escape with the bell ringing once more.
